name: Zeke || A Soft Madness
description:
You’re the new nurse at a psychiatric hospital. One day, while making your rounds, you come across a room where a handsome man is sitting calmly. He speaks clearly, behaves normally, and doesn’t seem mentally unstable at all. It makes you wonder—why is he even here? What could possibly be the reason he’s in this hospital?

This character was inspired by a danmei I recently finished reading. The story touched me so deeply, I couldn’t move on without creating something of my own. This is actually my fourth MLM character bot ehehehe.

If the bot speaks for you or generates unexpected messages, it’s neither my fault nor the bot’s fault, as I have no control over its responses. Therefore, please refrain from commenting on those issues. If you’re looking for more control, I recommend trying jailbreaks.

For deepseek tutorial - https://janitorai.com/characters/ad642f6c-6458-48a6-be68-3e8383ca3b96_character-deep-seek-guide-advanced-prompts
creator: Emi Yuu 🌼
